text: Run project root (directory .qmd files): installs _extensions/<dept>/ folder. commit version control collaborators can render output without package installed.

title: Branded Quarto HTML Themes for Departments and Institutes

what: Not one of the departments? Use custom()
title: Branded Quarto HTML Themes for Departments and Institutes
text: Supply logo single base colour — package figures rest. Lighter paler tints derived colour, header text set white near-black depending dark colour , header stays readable whatever pick. colour must supplied correctly formatted HEX code.
code: # Installs _extensions/custom/, used as format: custom-html usedepartmenttheme::custom(colour = "#003865", logo = "images/logo.png")  # Give it a name: installs _extensions/my-lab/, used as format: my-lab-html usedepartmenttheme::custom(   colour = "#6E2585",   logo   = "images/my-lab.svg",   name   = "My Lab" )  # No logo? The header bar simply omits the image usedepartmenttheme::custom(colour = "#B45C1F")

title: Branded Quarto HTML Themes for Departments and Institutes
text: themes don’t force Quarto document options . install function accepts following opt-arguments belwo. Pass value write extension, leave unset fall back Quarto’s default: can always set per-document .qmd YAML instead (see Per-document overrides ).
code: usedepartmenttheme::lshtm(   toc            = TRUE,   toc_depth      = 3,   code_fold      = TRUE,   self_contained = TRUE,   warning        = FALSE,   message        = FALSE )

title: Branded Quarto HTML Themes for Departments and Institutes
text: set theme package prompt modify YAML.
code: --- title: "Resistance Profiles" subtitle: "MRC Gambia — 2024/25" format: lshtm-html        # or lshtm-mrcg-html / florey-html / <your-custom>-html ---

title: Branded Quarto HTML Themes for Departments and Institutes
Branded Quarto HTML Themes for Departments and Institutes
text: logo embedded (base64 data URI) header bar document’s favicon, browser tab shows logo . Supply logo logo = theme, install logo skip .
code: your-project/ ├── analysis.qmd └── _extensions/     └── lshtm/               # or florey/, lshtm_mrcg/, or your custom name         ├── _extension.yml         └── resources/             ├── theme.scss             ├── header.html             ├── favicon.html    # logo embedded as the browser-tab favicon             └── logo.png

title: Branded Quarto HTML Themes for Departments and Institutes
text: default logo doubles favicon. use dedicated favicon instead, pass favicon =: order precedence : favicon = argument, bundled favicon.png shipped department (one), logo. department without bundled favicon simply uses logo bundling one optional.

what: Install a custom-branded Quarto theme — custom
title: Install a custom-branded Quarto theme — custom
text: generic counterpart built-department themes (lshtm(), lshtm_mrcg(), florey()). Supply logo single base colour package works rest:

title: Install a custom-branded Quarto theme — custom
code: custom(   colour,   logo = NULL,   name = "custom",   title = NULL,   path = ".",   overwrite = FALSE,   toc = NULL,   toc_depth = NULL,   code_fold = NULL,   code_tools = NULL,   self_contained = NULL,   number_sections = NULL,   highlight_style = NULL,   warning = NULL,   message = NULL,   fig_width = NULL,   fig_height = NULL )

title: Install a custom-branded Quarto theme — custom
text: colour Primary brand colour hex string (e.g. "#003865" "#abc"). Lighter paler tints, readable header text colour, derived automatically. logo Path PNG, SVG, JPEG logo file. NULL, header bar rendered without logo. name Theme name. Used (sanitising lowercase letters, digits, hyphens) extension folder name format key, name = "Lab" installs _extensions/-lab/ used format: -lab-html. Defaults "custom". title Human-readable title recorded extension's _extension.yml. Defaults "<name> HTML Format". path Project root directory. Defaults current working directory. top-level folder project .qmd files subfolders can resolve extension. overwrite TRUE, replace existing _extensions/lshtm/ directory. Defaults FALSE. toc Show table contents (toc). Logical, NULL leave unset. toc_depth Deepest heading level shown table contents (toc-depth, e.g. 3). Requires toc = TRUE effect. code_fold Fold code blocks behind toggle (code-fold). Logical. code_tools Show document-level code menu (code-tools). Logical. self_contained Produce single self-contained HTML file assets inlined (sets embed-resources self-contained). Logical. number_sections Number section headings (number-sections). Logical. highlight_style Syntax-highlighting theme code (highlight-style, e.g. "github"). Single string. warning Show R warnings rendered output (execute: warning). Logical; set FALSE suppress. message Show R messages rendered output (execute: message). Logical; set FALSE suppress. fig_width Default figure width inches (execute: fig-width). Numeric. fig_height Default figure height inches (execute: fig-height). Numeric.

title: Install a custom-branded Quarto theme — custom
text: Invisibly returns path installed extension directory.

title: Install a custom-branded Quarto theme — custom
text: lighter paler tints colour derived automatically used sidebar backgrounds, heading accents, borders; header text set white near-black depending whether colour perceptually dark (WCAG relative luminance), header bar stays readable whatever colour pick; logo embedded base64 data URI renders correctly .qmd files anywhere project tree, doubles browser-tab favicon. extension installed _extensions/<name>/ path, _quarto.yml created path one already exist. Use format: <name>-html .qmd YAML.

title: Install a custom-branded Quarto theme — custom
text: theme imposes document defaults . format arguments unset (NULL) default written extension pass value; anything left unset omitted Quarto's default applies. can also set per-document .qmd YAML.

title: Install a custom-branded Quarto theme — custom
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # Your organisation's logo and brand colour — the package derives the rest usedepartmenttheme::custom(colour = "#003865", logo = "images/logo.png")  # A named theme, opting in to a table of contents and self-contained output usedepartmenttheme::custom(   colour         = "#6E2585",   logo           = "images/my-lab.svg",   name           = "My Lab",   toc            = TRUE,   self_contained = TRUE )  # No logo: the header bar simply omits the image usedepartmenttheme::custom(colour = "#B45C1F") } # }

what: Install the Florey Institute Quarto theme — florey
title: Install the Florey Institute Quarto theme — florey
text: Copies _extensions/florey/ path. Use format: florey-html .qmd YAML.

title: Install the Florey Institute Quarto theme — florey
code: florey(   path = ".",   logo = NULL,   colour = "#1a1a1a",   overwrite = FALSE,   toc = NULL,   toc_depth = NULL,   code_fold = NULL,   code_tools = NULL,   self_contained = NULL,   number_sections = NULL,   highlight_style = NULL,   warning = NULL,   message = NULL,   fig_width = NULL,   fig_height = NULL )

title: Install the Florey Institute Quarto theme — florey
text: path Project root directory. Defaults current working directory. top-level folder project .qmd files subfolders can resolve extension. logo Path PNG, SVG, JPEG logo file. NULL, bundled LSHTM placeholder logo used. colour Primary brand colour. Defaults near-black ("#1a1a1a"). overwrite TRUE, replace existing _extensions/lshtm/ directory. Defaults FALSE. toc Show table contents (toc). Logical, NULL leave unset. toc_depth Deepest heading level shown table contents (toc-depth, e.g. 3). Requires toc = TRUE effect. code_fold Fold code blocks behind toggle (code-fold). Logical. code_tools Show document-level code menu (code-tools). Logical. self_contained Produce single self-contained HTML file assets inlined (sets embed-resources self-contained). Logical. number_sections Number section headings (number-sections). Logical. highlight_style Syntax-highlighting theme code (highlight-style, e.g. "github"). Single string. warning Show R warnings rendered output (execute: warning). Logical; set FALSE suppress. message Show R messages rendered output (execute: message). Logical; set FALSE suppress. fig_width Default figure width inches (execute: fig-width). Numeric. fig_height Default figure height inches (execute: fig-height). Numeric.

title: Install the Florey Institute Quarto theme — florey
text: theme imposes document defaults . format arguments unset (NULL) default written extension pass value; anything left unset omitted Quarto's default applies. can also set per-document .qmd YAML.

title: Install the Florey Institute Quarto theme — florey

what: Install the LSHTM Quarto theme — lshtm
title: Install the LSHTM Quarto theme — lshtm
text: Copies _extensions/lshtm/ path creates _quarto.yml one already exist (required .qmd files subfolders can find extension). Use format: lshtm-html .qmd YAML.

title: Install the LSHTM Quarto theme — lshtm
code: lshtm(   path = ".",   logo = NULL,   colour = "#0D5257",   overwrite = FALSE,   toc = NULL,   toc_depth = NULL,   code_fold = NULL,   code_tools = NULL,   self_contained = NULL,   number_sections = NULL,   highlight_style = NULL,   warning = NULL,   message = NULL,   fig_width = NULL,   fig_height = NULL )

title: Install the LSHTM Quarto theme — lshtm
text: path Project root directory. Defaults current working directory. top-level folder project .qmd files subfolders can resolve extension. logo Path PNG, SVG, JPEG logo file. NULL, bundled LSHTM placeholder logo used. colour Primary brand colour hex string. Defaults LSHTM teal ("#0D5257"). Lighter paler tints derived automatically. overwrite TRUE, replace existing _extensions/lshtm/ directory. Defaults FALSE. toc Show table contents (toc). Logical, NULL leave unset. toc_depth Deepest heading level shown table contents (toc-depth, e.g. 3). Requires toc = TRUE effect. code_fold Fold code blocks behind toggle (code-fold). Logical. code_tools Show document-level code menu (code-tools). Logical. self_contained Produce single self-contained HTML file assets inlined (sets embed-resources self-contained). Logical. number_sections Number section headings (number-sections). Logical. highlight_style Syntax-highlighting theme code (highlight-style, e.g. "github"). Single string. warning Show R warnings rendered output (execute: warning). Logical; set FALSE suppress. message Show R messages rendered output (execute: message). Logical; set FALSE suppress. fig_width Default figure width inches (execute: fig-width). Numeric. fig_height Default figure height inches (execute: fig-height). Numeric.

title: Install the LSHTM Quarto theme — lshtm
text: Invisibly returns path installed extension directory.

title: Install the LSHTM Quarto theme — lshtm
text: theme imposes document defaults . format arguments unset (NULL) default written extension pass value; anything left unset omitted Quarto's default applies. can also set per-document .qmd YAML.

title: Install the LSHTM Quarto theme — lshtm
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # Install at the current working directory (must be your project root) usedepartmenttheme::lshtm()  # Explicit project root usedepartmenttheme::lshtm(path = "~/projects/my-analysis")  # Custom logo usedepartmenttheme::lshtm(path = "~/projects/my-analysis",                            logo = "images/logo.png")  # Opt in to a full-featured document (nothing is enabled unless you ask) usedepartmenttheme::lshtm(   toc            = TRUE,   toc_depth      = 3,   code_fold      = TRUE,   self_contained = TRUE,   warning        = FALSE,   message        = FALSE ) } # }

what: usedepartmenttheme: Quarto HTML themes for LSHTM departments — usedepartmenttheme-package
title: usedepartmenttheme: Quarto HTML themes for LSHTM departments — usedepartmenttheme-package
text: Installs branded Quarto HTML extension (format: dept-html) project one function call. Three department themes provided, plus generic option:

title: usedepartmenttheme: Quarto HTML themes for LSHTM departments — usedepartmenttheme-package
text: lshtm() — LSHTM teal (#0D5257), white header text lshtm_mrcg() — LSHTM / MRC Gambia joint branding, teal florey() — Florey Institute black header, white logo custom() — bring logo base colour; tints readable header text derived automatically themes impose document defaults . Optional Quarto settings — table contents, code folding, self-contained output, warning/message suppression, — opt-arguments install function: pass value enable setting, leave unset fall back Quarto's default. primary colour logo can overridden theme, logo also used browser-tab favicon. Much can also achieved Quarto's branding support (_brand.yml); see https://quarto.org/docs/reference/metadata/brand.html. package packages opinionated department themes installable extension collaborators can render single format: key per-project setup.

title: usedepartmenttheme: Quarto HTML themes for LSHTM departments — usedepartmenttheme-package
text: Maintainer: Jack Goodall jack.goodall@lshtm.ac.uk (ORCID)

title: usedepartmenttheme 0.1.0
text: Initial release. Three built-department themes: lshtm(), lshtm_mrcg(), florey(). Generic custom() theme: supply logo single base colour; lighter/paler tints derived automatically header text colour chosen readability colour’s luminance. Themes impose document defaults. Quarto settings (table contents, code folding, self-contained output, warning/message suppression, section numbering, figure sizes, highlight style) opt-arguments every install function; anything left unset falls back Quarto’s default. logo embedded browser-tab favicon well header bar. dedicated favicon can supplied favicon =; otherwise bundled per-department favicon.png used present, falling back logo. README notes Quarto’s native branding (_brand.yml) covers many needs.
